section.div: An open-source self-hosted server implementing the Expo Updates protocol, built for production. Multi-app dashboard, progressive rollouts, instant rollbacks, served from your own bucket and CDN.
Burning through your subscriptions too fast? Paying for stuff you never use? Stop guessing. OpenUsage is free and open source.
